title: LearningTaskContract v1
description: Content-governed join between Hugin task/product evidence and gille-inference serving/capability evidence.
x-grimnir-conflict-key-applicability: record applies to active records and tombstones; kind-specific keys apply only when lifecycle_state is active
x-grimnir-inference-exposure-conflict-ke: The combined pointer list is conditional: observed-event supplies event_key and negative-coverage-query supplies lookup_id; the absent sibling is encoded by the conflict-key evaluator, so these are two distinct keys rather than one three-field live key.
x-grimnir-correction-semantics: A differing same-natural-key record is valid only as one strictly time-advancing acyclic same-producer/same-kind/same-domain supersession chain. Quality corrections use a new native receipt id and a stable correction_group_key. Consumers select the unique unsuperseded leaf; unlinked conflicts, forks, cycles, self-targets, cross-key targets, and time-travel corrections fail closed.

x-grimnir-field-owners./tombstone/**: producer.component; counter_audit verifies separately trusted membership tokens issued by each actual counter owner and may therefore cross the record-producer boundary
x-grimnir-field-owners./execution/model_started_at,/execution/m: the serving runtime; producer.component copies the immutable observation
x-grimnir-field-owners./execution/serving/**: gille-inference when a gateway ran; otherwise task.origin_component
x-grimnir-field-owners./transport/state: producer.component, mechanically constrained by origin and macro route
x-grimnir-field-owners./transport/hugin_request_stamp/preflight: gille-inference, authenticated and copied by hugin
x-grimnir-field-owners./artifacts/items/**: producer.component for the binding; items[].owner for referenced content
x-grimnir-field-owners./quality_receipt/native_receipt/**: hugin native artifact; schema v1 is preserved exactly and future correction v2 is explicitly versioned
x-grimnir-field-owners./quality_receipt/**: hugin normalized bridge projection; derived attempt/rubric fields are not claims about native v1
x-grimnir-field-owners./governance/policy_manifest/**: authenticated content owners or their explicit delegates; producer.component copies attestations
x-grimnir-field-owners./lineage/correction_targets: producer.component; same producer, record kind, and fact domain only
x-grimnir-field-owners./lineage/correction_ref,/lineage/success: producer.component; correction targets remain constrained to one authoritative natural key
x-grimnir-field-owners./review/**: hugin for task-outcome, experiment-observation, quality-receipt, and experiment-product-rating; gille-inference for inference-exposure and capability-evidence

x-version-behavior.major: contract_version is exact; an unknown major fails closed
x-version-behavior.revision: schema_revision is pinned to 1 for this schema and preflight; any other revision fails closed and requires a separately published schema/reader branch
x-version-behavior.extensions: unknown keys are allowed only below extensions and must not affect v1 decisions
x-version-behavior.migration: expand consumer, switch producer, retire old reader after the declared compatibility window

taskType.description: Closed per-version taxonomy owned by gille-inference. Add a new explicit branch for a new taxonomy version; never reinterpret an existing id/version.
